text: Bridges the pure SQLiteWorkflowStateStore (which accepts session_id: str) to the WorkflowStateStore protocol expected by StepFlow (which passes sess objects).

title: workflow
text: Bridges the pure SQLiteWorkflowStateStore (which accepts session_id: str) to the WorkflowStateStore protocol expected by StepFlow (which passes sess objects).

title: workflow
text:
StructureDecompWorkflow
Main workflow class that orchestrates the structure decomposition process. It creates and manages:

SQLiteWorkflowStateStore: Persistent state storage for workflow progress
Services: Source, Segmentation, Alignment, and Graph services
StepFlow: 3-step wizard with navigation
Routes: API endpoints for the workflow


source

StructureDecompWorkflow

def StructureDecompWorkflow(
    plugin_manager:PluginManager, # Plugin manager from host application
    config:Optional=None, # Workflow configuration
):

Self-contained structure decomposition workflow.

title: init
text:
source



def init_core_routers(
    workflow:StructureDecompWorkflow, # The workflow instance
    prefix:str, # Base prefix for core routes (e.g., "/workflow/core")
)->Tuple: # (routers, merged_routes)

Initialize and return all core workflow routers.
Note: Chrome switching route is now in cjm-transcript-segment-align library. It is initialized in routes/init.py alongside the other segment-align routes.

title: config
text:
source

StructureDecompWorkflowConfig

def StructureDecompWorkflowConfig(
    workflow_id:str='structure_decomposition', route_prefix:str='/structure_decomp', stepflow_prefix:str='/flow',
    container_id:str='sd-workflow-container', show_progress:bool=True, max_history_depth:int=500,
    text_plugin:str='cjm-text-plugin-nltk', vad_plugin:str='cjm-media-plugin-silero-vad',
    graph_plugin:str='cjm-graph-plugin-sqlite', fa_plugin_name:str='cjm-transcription-plugin-qwen3-forced-aligner',
    sysmon_plugin_name:Optional=None, source_categories:List=<factory>, no_plugins_redirect:Optional=None,
    state_db_path:Optional=None, config_dir:Path=<factory>
)->None:

Configuration for structure decomposition workflow.
